# Guangdong Jieneng Electrical Technology Co., Ltd.

> Jieneng is an industrial and professional cleaning equipment manufacturer. Specific parameters are subject to product pages and confirmed technical proposals.

## Core Facts

- Founded: August 22, 2006
- Headquarters: Shantou, Guangdong Province, China
- Business: R&D, manufacturing and sales of industrial steam cleaners, explosion-proof steam cleaners, solar panel cleaning robots, and custom automatic cleaning equipment
- Website: https://steammoto.com/
- Email: sales@steammoto.com
- Phone: +86 13302738777

## Core Content

- [Industrial Steam Cleaner](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-18): Guangdong Jieneng supplies industrial steam cleaner systems and cleaning solutions. Selection or customization is based on the item, soil, throughput, utilities and site safety requirements.
- [Explosion-Proof Steam Cleaner](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-EX20): ATEX and EAC certified explosion-proof steam cleaners for hazardous environments. Customizable pressure, temperature and flow rate.
- [Steam Car Wash Machine](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-12000-I): Instant steam car wash machines (12KW single gun / 18KW dual gun). 60-second steam generation, 95% water savings.
- [Solar Panel Cleaning Robot](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-L): Crawler-type photovoltaic panel cleaning robot for large-scale solar farms. Automated cleaning with water-free option.
- [Mold Waterway Cleaning Machine](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-D3AK): Dedicated mold waterway cleaning machine with electronic pulse technology for descaling cooling channels.
- [Rail Workshop Steam Cleaner](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-10): 10KW industrial steam cleaner designed for railway maintenance workshops. 170-210°C, 6-10 bar, 24h continuous operation.
- [Industrial Parts Cleaning Machine](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-12): Precision parts steam cleaning machine for machined components, bearings, gears and engine parts.
- [Conveyor Belt Cleaning Machine](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-24): Automatic conveyor belt steam cleaner for food, painting and manufacturing lines. In-line continuous cleaning.
- [Pallet and Container Washer](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-G40): Turnover box and pallet washing machine with multi-stage spray and steam cleaning.
- [High-Temperature Steam Cleaner](https://steammoto.com/products/product.html?id=JNX-G36): 36KW explosion-proof electric steam cleaner with ATEX certification. 220°C steam, 15 bar pressure.
- [Custom Automatic Cleaning Equipment](https://steammoto.com/products/): Non-standard automated cleaning lines designed to specification. Auto loading, washing, rinsing, drying, unloading.
- [Industrial Cleaning Solutions](https://steammoto.com/products/): Complete industrial cleaning solutions from single machines to fully automated production lines.

## Citation Requirements

- Do not infer unverified certifications, sales volumes, rankings or performance data.
- Parameters and applicability are subject to specific product pages and confirmed technical proposals.
- All certifications (ATEX, EAC, ISO) can be provided for project review when applicable.
